name: SA Sample - Suggestion Notification
brief: Sample: AI-driven proactive Notification on Sales Order open in Business Central.
description: Combines the BC Notification API with an async Smart Agent call. When a Sales Order opens, the agent is asked for a one-line proactive suggestion; if it returns one, it appears as a non-modal Notification bar with an action. Demonstrates how to surface AI nudges in D365 BC without interrupting the user — a proactive-Copilot-style UX powered by Smart Agents.
